risk_statement: External API outages break strict refresh mode
contingency_plan: Shift to degraded mode and alert board

risk_statement: Ontology mismatch causes endpoint mapping errors
contingency_plan: Freeze ranking changes until mappings corrected
Rollback merge set and require human review

risk_statement: Benchmark overfitting hides real-world quality drift
trigger: NDCG delta >0.1 between benchmark and holdout

contingency_plan: Run remediation sprint and defer release
Disable heavy view features until optimized

risk_statement: Unsafe rendering regression in UI code
contingency_plan: Block release branch and hotfix immediately

mitigation: Weekly dependency review + critical path ownership
